6/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tuned/utils/polkit.py
__init__
polkit.__init__c
Check authorization, return codes:
			1  - authorized
			2  - polkit error, but authorized with fallback method
			0  - unauthorized
			-1 - polkit error and unauthorized by the fallback method
			-2 - polkit error and unable to use the fallback method
		NF
system-bus-name
namer
error querying polkit: %sz,error using falback authorization method: %s
